generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Low-level driver reading temperature measurements periodically and transmitting to RabbitMQ server"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureData
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance TemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature measurements collected from vehicle sensors at regular intervals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, Scipy
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD-based geometric model for structural details of automotive vehicle chassis and body"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic model described by differential equations for vehicular motion analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm, Scipy
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical model representing cyber and physical aspects of the vehicle system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationAlgorithm
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message-oriented middleware for real-time data exchange between sensors and DT platform"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictionService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService, ControlService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy package for numerical computation and solving differential equations"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictionService, OptimizationService
]

instance CalibrationAlgorithm : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimization-based algorithm updating model parameters using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, OptimizationService
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of safety and optimal performance using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance PredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time simulation of Physical Twin's behavior for predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of vehicle performance using optimizers"
    DTDFVocab:provides PerformanceOptimizationInsight
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control for automated adjustments to Physical Twin"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Anomaly detection in vehicle operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Inference of system state from sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected safety violations in vehicle operation"
]

instance PerformanceOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identified opportunities for performance optimization"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted future behavior based on current simulation"
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated adjustment to vehicle components based on control signals"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies in vehicle system"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inferred current state of the vehicle system"
]

instance VehicleChassis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural design of the automotive vehicle's chassis"
]

instance VehicleBody : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Body style of the automotive vehicle"
]

instance VehicleWheels : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Size specifications of the automotive vehicle's wheels"
]

instance VehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains VehicleChassis, VehicleBody, VehicleWheels
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The Raspberry Pi controller subscribes to the RabbitMQ server for control commands targeting the fan and heatbed actuators, executing these commands through the communication server."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin employs calibration algorithms to update the models of the Cyber-Physical System (CPS) and environment with the best estimate of the parameters; the resulting data informs monitors that check system safety and optimality, with violations triggering human or algorithmic changes to the Physical Twin."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker facilitates communication using AMQP protocol in a publish-subscribe topology. Message acknowledgments and durable queues ensure reliable data transmission between physical sensors and digital components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ server is deployed on a Raspberry Pi edge device for on-premise hosting, utilizing local computational resources with no cloud infrastructure. The deployment model is single-node edge computing, with scalability limited by the hardware capabilities of the Raspberry Pi."
]
